title: More Menu
heading: E-Governance
text:
| EDUCATION | FINANCIAL INCLUSION |
| ⋅PMGDISHA ⋅NIOS Services | ⋅Banking Correspondents ⋅Insurance Services ⋅Pension Services |

**OTHERS:-**

1. Pan Card Services
2. Passport Services
3. Mobile Recharge
4. DTH Recharge
5. IRCTC(Railway Ticketing), Air Ticketing, BusTicketing, & Bill Payments
6. Tele-Law Service
7. Online Admission form fill up for Navodaya Vidyalaya & Admit Card Print
